list.name: Changes
list.comment:
fix: update UUIDs in seed data to ensure RFC-4122 v4 compliance
- Adjusted route and trip UUIDs to conform to RFC-4122 version 4 standard. - Updated comments to highlight validation requirements for UUIDs. - Ensured consistency for seeded data with idempotent operations.

task.summary:
fix: resolve RLS recursion issue, improve email confirmation flow
- Fixed infinite recursion in RLS policies by introducing `current_user_role()` as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function to avoid self-referential queries. - Moved `current_user_role()` to an internal schema to restrict API exposure. - Updated RLS policies to reference the internal role helper. - Enabled email confirmation in Supabase config to align with updated authentication flow. - Enhanced user registration feedback and adjusted related repository and use-case logic for email confirmation handling.

feat: add theme toggle, improve UI consistency with new design tokens
- Introduced a theme toggle component for light/dark mode switching with localStorage support. - Updated UI elements and forms to use consistent design tokens for colors, borders, and backgrounds. - Applied a professional palette derived from the UBBS crest. - Enhanced the header with logo support and integrated theme toggle. - Improved error handling for password reset requests with rate-limiting feedback.

feat: implement booking and waitlist flow with seat selection
- Introduced seat reservation and waitlist actions for trip bookings. - Added UI for seat maps, booking details, and payment panels. - Integrated booking confirmation, cancellation, and waitlist management with real-time updates. - Implemented backend support for getting occupied seats and trip seat maps. - Seeded data with deterministic, idempotent routes and trips for testing.

fix: update UUIDs in seed data to ensure RFC-4122 v4 compliance
- Adjusted route and trip UUIDs to conform to RFC-4122 version 4 standard. - Updated comments to highlight validation requirements for UUIDs. - Ensured consistency for seeded data with idempotent operations.

MESSAGE.value:
fix: resolve RLS recursion issue, improve email confirmation flow
- Fixed infinite recursion in RLS policies by introducing `current_user_role()` as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function to avoid self-referential queries. - Moved `current_user_role()` to an internal schema to restrict API exposure. - Updated RLS policies to reference the internal role helper. - Enabled email confirmation in Supabase config to align with updated authentication flow. - Enhanced user registration feedback and adjusted related repository and use-case logic for email confirmation handling.

feat: add theme toggle, improve UI consistency with new design tokens
- Introduced a theme toggle component for light/dark mode switching with localStorage support. - Updated UI elements and forms to use consistent design tokens for colors, borders, and backgrounds. - Applied a professional palette derived from the UBBS crest. - Enhanced the header with logo support and integrated theme toggle. - Improved error handling for password reset requests with rate-limiting feedback.

feat: implement booking and waitlist flow with seat selection
- Introduced seat reservation and waitlist actions for trip bookings. - Added UI for seat maps, booking details, and payment panels. - Integrated booking confirmation, cancellation, and waitlist management with real-time updates. - Implemented backend support for getting occupied seats and trip seat maps. - Seeded data with deterministic, idempotent routes and trips for testing.

fix: update UUIDs in seed data to ensure RFC-4122 v4 compliance
- Adjusted route and trip UUIDs to conform to RFC-4122 version 4 standard. - Updated comments to highlight validation requirements for UUIDs. - Ensured consistency for seeded data with idempotent operations.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
fix: update UUIDs in seed data to ensure RFC-4122 v4 compliance
- Adjusted route and trip UUIDs to conform to RFC-4122 version 4 standard. - Updated comments to highlight validation requirements for UUIDs. - Ensured consistency for seeded data with idempotent operations.
